'''Linjak Mosa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for destroying several of the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord's]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]]. His bounty, worth 6,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 3,000 credits [[Death/Legends|dead]], was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
